---
title: "jaxcmr"
description: "JAX-accelerated toolkit for computational memory research"
---

**jaxcmr** is a JAX-accelerated toolkit for modeling memory search, featuring implementations of Context Maintenance and Retrieval (CMR) models and variants for free/serial recall.

## Installation

You can install the latest stable version of jaxcmr using pip:

```bash
pip install jaxcmr
```

You can also install the development version directly from the code
repository on GitHub:

```bash
pip install git+https://github.com/githubpsyche/jaxcmr
```

## Explore

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Concepts](/concepts/)
Understand how CMR works: temporal context, associative memory, and model parameters.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Projects](/projects/)
Research projects using jaxcmr for computational memory modeling.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Blog](/blog/)
Updates, tutorials, and research notes.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [GitHub](https://github.com/githubpsyche/jaxcmr)
Source code and issue tracker.
:::

:::
